title: Bruno's Enchantments
description: Adds custom enchantments and rework vanilla ones
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7cb57f3d0a05261fbabe0c146905524ab80e4d4b.png)


Adds a few enchantments and rework a lot of vanilla ones!

**New enchantments**

-Bacon Slicer: deals more damage for pig mobs

![crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8861550c5ac000cb45bf6b4dd46ad1ca4b81a71d.png)

-Explosive Burst: makes a explosion when using the mace smash attack (requires recipe)

![crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aaa1c4d8a634e92de6c634f6d2bd276e98335542.png)

-Turbulence: deals more damage for mobs in the air

-Spite of the Sea: makes fishing worse

-Magic and Melee Protections: self-explanatory

-Light Shield: protects from damage when in a light level higher than 7 

![crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f0823e0c87a588376a280b0e18293734f2a6ae0e.png)

-Shadow Strike: increases the damage in light levels lower than 6

-Focus: reduce multishot spread

-Spread: increases multishot spread

-Gravity: pulls mobs to the mob attacked

![crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c23d373b8884faf24a303e168a12431c4475a5e6.png)

-Overburn: deals more damage for mobs on fire and fire mobs (except blazes)

![crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f15b39804bcb05d7f3d4057d6985207ed8f88482.png)

**Reworked vanilla enchantments**

-Protection, Sharpness, Power: don't exist anymore, this is because they overshadow less generic enchantments

-Infinity: has 3 levels, works with every arrow in the game, is chance based (like dungeons) and works with crossbow

-Flame: works with both bows now

-Piercing and breach: merged info just piercing, it's now a damage enchantment, with means is not compatible with other enchantments that increase damage

-Multishot: works with bows and has 2 levels

-Fire Aspect: works with tridents now and has a crafting recipe

![crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/08af4d25a8711f2d113bf6fe5bd628c91ba7b8cf.png)

-Density: increases player gravity and fall damage as a drawback

-Wind Burst: works as before the ''''buffs'''' and has a crafting recipe

![crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f60b75b684b9e0be0e06d11281ea17dbf0746303.png)

-Impaling: works as both java and bedrock impaling

-Smite: works with all weapons now

-Bane of Arthropods: now works with all weapons and infested/weaving mobs, has a crafting recipe

![crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1fd701c84a5165bf4d27be7fc7001b587db7d582.png)

**extra**

-projectiles ignore i-frames

-enchanting bottles have a crafting recipe now

![crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cc2c2fee348f9f008fc19d23f4462b57a434fcaa.png)

Follow me on twitter!
[https://x.com/BrunoGoldberg](https://x.com/BrunoGoldberg)
